learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Present your vision. Earn the opportunity.
learn.summary: Synthesize your FEC into a 3-year plan and venture pitch for Stage Gate 1.
bullets: By Week 4 your blueprint becomes your 3-Year Business Plan and Venture Pitch
Pitch structure: You → Customer → Value → How you operate → How you earn → Where you are headed
Stage Gate 1 evaluates clarity, feasibility, and readiness to advise
learn.callout: Bring a complete FEC. Coaches evaluate your Stage Gate 1 panel.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Pitch rehearsal
workshop.summary: Practice your venture pitch with squad and coach feedback.
bullets: Coach notes on clarity and confidence

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Stage Gate 1 — Venture Pitch
assignment.summary: Submit your pitch materials and complete Stage Gate 1 evaluation.
bullets: Complete Stage Gate 1 when your coach schedules the panel

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: How did your pitch land?
reflection.summary: Capture feedback before the Advise segment.
prompts: What feedback will you act on first?
What are you most proud of in your blueprint?
What do you need to practice in Weeks 5–7?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 4 complete
submit.summary: Unlock the Advise segment — master the sales process.
